name: Your strange 'Friends'.
description:
(Request)

On the first day of freshman year you felt everything was going well and that this was gonna be your year- But At the end of the day a group of 6 seniors Axel, Josh, Liam, Alvin, Naomi & Finn Approach you seeming to take a keen interest in your Innocent and Naive Like behavior start bombarding you with compliments like "I Love your hair!" And "You seem so nice...we should hangout sometime!" and you needing friends say yes.
creator: Secretcircle
